title: Add cleanup for setInterval/setTimeout in React components
summary: Multiple React components use setInterval/setTimeout without proper cleanup, potentially causing memory leaks.
acceptance: Audit all setInterval/setTimeout usage in React components
Add useEffect cleanup for all timers
Add ESLint rule to enforce cleanup pattern
notes: Common React pattern mistake. Prior component references have been fixed; re-audit current React components for missing timer cleanup and ensure useEffect returns appropriate cleanup functions.
